.Image_fixedHeight {
	position: relative;
    display: table;
    height: 250px;
    width: 100%;
}
.Image_fixedHeight:before {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    height: 4px;
    width: 0;
    bottom: -10px;
    border-radius: 50px;
    background-color: #00a3fe;
    background-image: -webkit-linear-gradient(45deg,rgba(255,255,255,.15) 25%,transparent 25%,transparent 50%,rgba(255,255,255,.15) 50%,rgba(255,255,255,.15) 75%,transparent 75%,transparent);
    background-image: -o-linear-gradient(45deg,rgba(255,255,255,.15) 25%,transparent 25%,transparent 50%,rgba(255,255,255,.15) 50%,rgba(255,255,255,.15) 75%,transparent 75%,transparent);
    background-image: linear-gradient(45deg,rgba(255,255,255,.15) 25%,transparent 25%,transparent 50%,rgba(255,255,255,.15) 50%,rgba(255,255,255,.15) 75%,transparent 75%,transparent);
    -webkit-background-size: 20px 20px;
    background-size: 20px 20px;
    -webkit-animation: kbeditor-progress-bar-stripes 2s linear infinite;
    -o-animation: kbeditor-progress-bar-stripes 2s linear infinite;
    animation: kbeditor-progress-bar-stripes 2s linear infinite;
}
@-webkit-keyframes kbeditor-progress-bar-stripes {
  from {
    background-position: 40px 0;
  }
  to {
    background-position: 0 0;
  }
}
@-o-keyframes kbeditor-progress-bar-stripes {
  from {
    background-position: 40px 0;
  }
  to {
    background-position: 0 0;
  }
}
@keyframes kbeditor-progress-bar-stripes {
  from {
    background-position: 40px 0;
  }
  to {
    background-position: 0 0;
  }
}
.Image_fixedHeight.Docs_Animate_Loading:before{
	width:100%;
	-webkit-transition: all 3s ease-in-out 0s;
	transition: all 3s ease-in-out 0s;
	-moz-transition: all 3s ease-in-out 0s;
}
.Image_fixedHeight .Image_fixedSpan {
    display: table-cell;
    vertical-align: middle;
    margin: auto;
}

/*Hash css*/

.hash_header {

    text-transform: uppercase;
    font-size: 12px;
    padding: 18px 18px 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #000;
}

    height: 1px;
    width: 20px;
    position: absolute;
    background-color: #5A616F;
}

    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 0;
}
.zde_mention_popup_hash li {
    padding: 10px 18px;
    text-transform: capitalize;
    line-height: 1.5;
    max-width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}
.zde_mention_popup_hash .zde_mention_list {

}
.zde_mention_popup_hash li:hover, .zde_mention_popup_hash li.sel {
    background-color: #f6f8fb;
}


.zde_check_box {
    position: relative;
    font-size:0;
}
.zde_check_box input[type=checkbox] {
    display: none;
  }
  .zde_check_box label {
    height: 15px;
    width: 15px;
    background-color: #fff;
    border: 1px solid #788190;
    position: relative;
    transition: border-color ease .125s;
    cursor: pointer;
    border-radius: 2px;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }
  .zde_check_box input[type=checkbox]:checked+label, 
  .zde_check_box:hover label {
    border-color: #3D78FB;
  }
  .zde_check_box label,.zde_check_box label::before,.zde_check_box label::after {
    display: inline-block;
  }
  .zde_check_box label::before,.zde_check_box label::after {
    content: ' ';
    position: absolute;
    height: 0;
    width: 1px;
    background-color: #3D78FB;
    transform-origin: left top;
    z-index: 2;
  }
  .zde_check_box label::before {
    top: 9px;
    left: 8px;
    transform: rotate(-135deg);
  }
  .zde_check_box label::after {
    top: 5px;
    left: 3px;
    transform: rotate(-45deg);
  }
  .zde_check_box input[type=checkbox]:checked+label::before {
    height: 14px;
    animation: toptick .25s ease 0s forwards;
  }
  @keyframes toptick {
    0% {height: 0}
    50% {height: 0}
    100% {height: 14px}
  }
  .zde_check_box input[type=checkbox]:checked+label::after {
    height: 6px;
    animation: bottomtick .125s ease 0s forwards;
  }
  @keyframes bottomtick {
    0% {height: 0}
    100% {height: 6px}
  }
  .zde_check_box label span:before,.zde_check_box label span:after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    background: transparent;
    z-index: 1;
    display: inline-block;
    transition: background .125s ease;
  }
  .zde_check_box label span:before {
    right: -1px;
    width: 2px;
    top: -1px;
    height: 8px;
  }
  .zde_check_box label span:after {
    top: -1px;
    right: 0;
    width: 2px;
    height: 2px;
  }
  .zde_check_box input[type=checkbox]:checked+label span:before, .zde_check_box input[type=checkbox]:checked+label span:after {
    background: #fff;
  }
.desk_editor_listIcon{
    cursor: pointer;
    width: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
    font-size: 14px;
    text-align: left;
    white-space: nowrap;

    display: flex;

}

.desk_editor_listIcon svg{

}
.desk_editor_list_numDot{

}
.desk_editor_list_line{

.KB_Editor_NumOptionCont .desk_editor_listActive,
.KB_Editor_BulletUL .desk_editor_listActive,

.zde_mention_popup li .mention_text_container {

}
.primary_name{

.secondary_name {

/* find and replace css :start */

.zde_far_popup{
    border: none;
}

.zde_far_container{
    font-size: 12px;
    position: absolute;
    border: 1px solid #d5dde7;
    background-color: #fff;
    border-radius: 6px;
    min-width: 375px;
    max-width: 800px;
    -moz-box-shadow: 0px 4px 32px 1px rgba(44, 51, 77, 0.12);
    -webkit-box-shadow: 0px 4px 32px 1px rgba(44, 51, 77, 0.12);
    box-shadow: 0px 4px 32px 1px rgba(44, 51, 77, 0.12);
    z-index: 1000;
    width: 500px;
}
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .zde_far_container {
      width: 80%;          
      max-width: 600px;
    }
    .zde_far_footer {
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .zde_far_container {
      width: 70%; 
      min-width: 325px; 
    }
     .zde_far_footer {
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
  }

.zde_far_footer{
    border: none;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 10px 30px;
    border-top: 1px solid #ebf0f5;
    display: flex;
    gap: 10px;
}
.zde_far_header {
    border-bottom: 1px solid #EBF0F5;
    height: 50px;
    padding: 20px 30px;
    color: #000;
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 600;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    gap: 8px;
    cursor: move;
}
.zde_far_close {
    position: relative;
    right: -8px;
}
.zde_far_body {
    display: flex;
    padding: 25px 30px;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 25px;
}
.zde_far_field {
    gap: 10px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    width: 100%;
}
.zde_far_field_title {
    color: #000;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 400;
}
.zde_far_clear svg {
    height: 14px;
    width: 14px;
    color: #5A616F;
    fill: currentColor;
}
.zde_far_clear {
    display: flex;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}
.zde_far_field_box {
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    gap: 10px;
    align-items: center;
}
.zde_far_input {
    font-size: 14px;
    height: 28px;
    letter-spacing: .1px;
    width: 100%;
    border: none;
    outline: none;
    padding: 0;
    background-color: transparent;
    border-radius: initial;
    box-shadow: none;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #D5DDE7;
}
.zde_far_count{
    color: #788190;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 400;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
}
.zde_far_input:hover {
    border-color: #8a8a8a;
}
.zde_far_input:focus {
    border-color: #0a73eb;
}
.zde_far_clear svg:hover {
    cursor: pointer;
    color: #000;
}
.zde_far_count_box {
    position: absolute;
    right: 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
}
#zde_far_find_input {
    padding-right: 85px;
}
/* find and replace css :end */


/* chebox css start */


.zde_check_box {
    position: relative;
    font-size:0;
}
.zde_check_box input[type=checkbox] {
    display: none;
}
.zde_check_box label {
    height: 15px;
    width: 15px;
    background-color: #fff;
    border: 1px solid #788190;
    position: relative;
    transition: border-color ease .125s;
    cursor: pointer;
    border-radius: 2px;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}
.zde_check_box input[type=checkbox]:checked+label, 
.zde_check_box:hover label {
    border-color: #0A73EB;
}
.zde_check_box label,
.zde_check_box label::before,
.zde_check_box label::after {
    display: inline-block;
}
.zde_check_box label::before,
.zde_check_box label::after {
    content: ' ';
    position: absolute;
    height: 0;
    width: 1px;
    background-color: #3D78FB;
    transform-origin: left top;
    z-index: 2;
}
.zde_check_box label::before {
    top: 9px;
    left: 8px;
    transform: rotate(-135deg);
}
.zde_check_box label::after {
    top: 5px;
    left: 3px;
    transform: rotate(-45deg);
}
.zde_check_box input[type=checkbox]:checked+label::before {
    height: 14px;
    animation: toptick .25s ease 0s forwards;
}
@keyframes toptick {
0% {
    height: 0;
}
50% {
    height: 0;
}
100% {
    height: 14px;
}
}
.zde_check_box input[type=checkbox]:checked+label::after {
height: 6px;
animation: bottomtick .125s ease 0s forwards;
}
@keyframes bottomtick {
0% {
    height: 0;
}
100% {
    height: 6px;
}
}

.zde_check_box label span:before,
.zde_check_box label span:after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    background: transparent;
    z-index: 1;
    display: inline-block;
    transition: background .125s ease;
}
.zde_check_box label span:before {
    right: -1px;
    width: 2px;
    top: -1px;
    height: 8px;
}
.zde_check_box label span:after {
    top: -1px;
    right: 0;
    width: 2px;
    height: 2px;
}
.zde_check_box input[type=checkbox]:checked+label span:before, 
.zde_check_box input[type=checkbox]:checked+label span:after {
    background: #fff;
}
.zde_checkbox_label {
    color: #000;
    font-size: 14px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    cursor: pointer;
}
.zde_far_field_select_box {
    display: flex;
    gap: 10px;
    align-items: center;
    width: 50%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}
.zde_far_field_select_container {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    row-gap: 15px;
    margin-top: 5px;
}
  /* chebox css end */

  /* radio button css start */

.zde_radio_input {
    display: none;
}
.zde_radio_button {
    vertical-align: middle;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 0.0625rem solid #788190;
    background-color: #fff;
    width: 0.9375rem;
    height: 0.9375rem;
    cursor: pointer;
}
.zde_radio_button::before {
    content: "";
    display: block;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    border-radius: inherit;
    transform: scale(0);
}
.zde_radio_input:checked + .zde_radio_button::before {
    transform: scale(0.5);
    background-color: #0a73eb;
}
.zde_radio_input:checked + .zde_radio_button {
    background-color: #fff;
    border-color: #0a73eb;
}
  /* radio button css end */

.zde_dropDown_search_input{

.zde_cd_wordList_container{

role="main" class="Layout__twoColumn" id="layoutContainer" style="min-height: 1056px;"><div class="Layout__layout1" data-id="column1"> <div class="ArticleDetailLeftContainer__wrapper commonStyle__positionRel"><div class="ArticleDetailLeftContainer__box"><div class="ArticleDetailLeftContainer__partHead commonStyle__dFlexSb"><h1 data-id="articleTitle" role="heading" aria-level="1" class="ArticleDetailLeftContainer__kbTitle commonStyle__flex1 commonStyle__wordBreak" tabindex="0" aria-describedby="articleContent">Using FSM Mobile Offline</h1><div class="ArticleDetailLeftContainer__prinExp commonStyle__dFlex"><div data-act-clickable="true" class="ArticleDetailLeftContainer__pdfView " title="Download as PDF" tabindex="0" role="button" aria-label="Download as PDF"><svg class="Icon__icon commonStyle__positionRel commonStyle__inlineBlock Icon__brand1 Icon__hoverblue1 " alt="Download as PDF"><use xlink:href="#pdfDownload"></use></svg></div><div data-act-clickable="true" data-id="articlePrint" class=" Printcontainer__print commonStyle__cursor" title="Print" tabindex="0" aria-label="print" role="button"><div class="Printcontainer__printerIcon"><svg class="Icon__icon commonStyle__positionRel commonStyle__inlineBlock Icon__hexGray20 Icon__hoverblue1 " alt="Print"><use xlink:href="#print"></use></svg></div></div><span data-act-clickable="true" title="Reader view" data-id="reader_view" class="ArticleDetailLeftContainer__IconExPrint commonStyle__cursor ArticleDetailLeftContainer__centerView" tabindex="0" role="button" aria-label="Reader view"><svg class="Icon__icon commonStyle__positionRel commonStyle__inlineBlock Icon__hexGray35 Icon__hoverblue1 " alt="Reader view"><use xlink:href="#centerView"></use></svg></span></div></div><div class="articleContent" id="articleContent"><div id="article_TOC" class="ArticleDetailLeftContainer__contents commonStyle__wordBreak ArticleDetail_description"><p class="description ArticleDetailLeftContainer__description" data-id="article_description" tabindex="0"><div>The <b>Offline Mode</b> of the Zoho FSM Mobile app enables you to access the data in your mobile app even when the internet connectivity is poor or non-existent. The offline mode of the Zoho FSM mobile app will come into effect when the offline mode is <a href="https://help.zoho.com/portal/en/kb/fsm/mobilize-your-workforce/articles/using-fsm-mobile-offline#Enabling_the_Offline_Mode" target="_self">enabled</a> and there is no internet connectivity. The offline mode is supported in the following versions of the mobile app:<br></div><ol><li class="sty__0fnrvb__cls">Android app (Version 1.6.0 and above)</li><li class="sty__6zutk0__cls">iOS app (Version 1.2.66 and above)<br></li></ol><div><span>When the offline mode is enabled, the following takes place:</span><br></div><ol><li class="sty__ih0oy1__cls">Details of the latest (by <b>Created Time</b>) 200 service appointments will be cached to be made available offline. Related details of these service appointments like Service Reports, Time Sheets, Trips, Notes, and Work Orders will also be cached to be made available offline.</li><li class="sty__zwyktj__cls">This automatic caching of the mobile app data will be scheduled for 8 am daily.<br><br></li></ol><div><hr><img src="https://help.zoho.com/galleryDocuments/edbsnee9ab807a7b25b4e8f807e302b324b57f8549b7c81c4029a89378771719c6d7d7d71f8d70838108b87eb52a5e35f3ac2448eb10a1758d3ae32af6ea729a6e6f6?inline=true" data-zdeskdocid="img_35426667722218275" class="docsimage sty__vx14xs__cls sty__avvx6q__cls sty__mkcsxe__cls sty__z42bpq__cls sty__0fyzim__cls sty__ya5wpv__cls" data-zdeskdocselectedclass=""><span class="sty__sfq41n__cls sty__wlnh55__cls sty__5sysbb__cls sty__md05a4__cls sty__lgms3t__cls"> </span><span class="size sty__a0ko9b__cls sty__of18jj__cls sty__fbum36__cls sty__95s3d2__cls sty__q5zd8y__cls sty__a75mke__cls"><span class="colour sty__znrxsu__cls sty__1l1cnp__cls sty__2qnrc1__cls sty__p194rb__cls sty__kmh06q__cls sty__krv4ep__cls">Available in Editions: <b>Standard</b>, <b>Professional</b>, <b>Premium</b><b class="sty__1dd0g2__cls sty__4xhw0j__cls sty__pc0e9r__cls sty__w9exsm__cls"><br></b></span></span></div><hr><h2 class="toc_anchors" id="Enabling_the_Offline_Mode">Enabling the Offline Mode</h2><div>In the iOS app, by default offline data will be <span>automatically cached at </span><span>8 am daily</span><span>. However, in the Android app, to enable the offline mode, do the following:</span></div><ol><li class="sty__6p3p7f__cls">Log in to the Zoho FSM mobile app.<br></li><li class="sty__g1anva__cls">Click <b>Settings </b>in the left menu.<br><br><img src="https://help.zoho.com/galleryDocuments/edbsnee9ab807a7b25b4e8f807e302b324b571d1b10cd8b19eec3ad8853d5b5af729431fe08d45d884fcc38eaaeb8caff2e60945851651ff905880f44319d06150a39?inline=true" data-zdeskdocid="img_9803659922375323" class="docsimage sty__ydf6lv__cls" data-zdeskdocselectedclass="small"><br><br></li><li class="sty__eehyam__cls">Click <b>Offline Mode</b>.<br><br><img src="https://help.zoho.com/galleryDocuments/edbsnee9ab807a7b25b4e8f807e302b324b57e657e867a0738f80011b09d37694a9d327600485e334c37f697c81b2da88a48d71306cdc9f6404c22ba72b588e5db300?inline=true" data-zdeskdocid="img_5165099808407505" class="docsimage sty__r1rebu__cls" data-zdeskdocselectedclass="small"><br><br></li><li class="sty__l13obx__cls">Enable<b> Offline Mode</b>.<br><br><img src="https://help.zoho.com/galleryDocuments/edbsnee9ab807a7b25b4e8f807e302b324b57115d1f8ed2fdac551c81a7f0fbda88d7763e900afa3e14109d8c62ed7f0af7fc066f9f439edb9c60cfdee69ef0a12547?inline=true" data-zdeskdocid="img_07310136254389388" class="docsimage sty__meo7ea__cls" data-zdeskdocselectedclass="small"><br></li></ol><div>Once the offline mode is enabled, the data for the offline mode will be fetched and stored in the device's internal storage.<br></div><div><br></div><div><img src="https://help.zoho.com/galleryDocuments/edbsnee9ab807a7b25b4e8f807e302b324b57461ae3eb9828580f18ef76dfe1279a4cb1992a00751793d99b32cd9e720d61ea1c049b5b1ec5c10ca5f49b439893ee4f?inline=true" data-zdeskdocid="img_9668844879009972" class="docsimage sty__zg9mdc__cls" data-zdeskdocselectedclass="small"> <br></div><div><br></div><div>You can also manually<span> perform the caching of offline data using the <b>Sync Now</b> option. </span>The <b>Sync Now</b> option will be available in the left menu only if the <b>Offline Mode</b> has been enabled.<br></div><div><br></div><div><span><img src="https://help.zoho.com/galleryDocuments/edbsnee9ab807a7b25b4e8f807e302b324b575dd82020cc0052225913b108e0a5cf5bd6f9a30491292ac5079a12c1ea768ef5a95b461bc69bb9ce4ce962b5440489c2?inline=true" data-zdeskdocid="img_4923308405744393" class="docsimage sty__y16kz2__cls" data-zdeskdocselectedclass="small">     <img src="https://help.zoho.com/galleryDocuments/edbsnee9ab807a7b25b4e8f807e302b324b57d5583093237f71caece5f7bb1760e25297a79b59a5b32f18bc99114c3cd4315b570c7d633502b1f6baabbcbdb2659964?inline=true" data-zdeskdocid="img_8461850223148442" class="docsimage sty__f8zqt2__cls" data-zdeskdocselectedclass="small"></span><br></div><div><h3 id="Automatic_Data_Synchronization" class="toc_anchors">Automatic Data Synchronization<br></h3><div>When the offline mode is enabled, automatic caching of data will be scheduled for 8 am daily. This scheduled data caching will not be executed in the following scenarios:<br></div></div><ol><li class="sty__qks98k__cls">The user has logged out of the mobile app<br></li><li class="sty__y6f8f5__cls">The user hasn't used the mobile app for three days continuously<br></li><li class="sty__srdtjm__cls">There is no internet connectivity<br></li><li class="sty__gsu5hg__cls">Any settings (e.g. battery optimization) in the phone that restricts such activity</li></ol><div><div><span class="KB_New_Editor_Highlights sty__kpwusw__cls"><div></div><div>The offline data will be lost when the user logs out of the mobile app.</div></span></div></div><div><h2 id="Using_the_Offline_Mode" class="toc_anchors">Using the Offline Mode<br></h2><div>When internet connectivity is not available, the offline mode will come into effect. To access the cached data for offline use, simply tap on the <b>Reload</b> option located at the bottom of the screen. Click <b>Proceed</b> in the confirmation message.<br><br></div></div><div><img src="https://help.zoho.com/galleryDocuments/edbsnee9ab807a7b25b4e8f807e302b324b574417988ef29f35b2289bd381beebe62a9df07157e48b58b86a8da7931d05a865dc413bcce6b13c79a5592980bf56c620?inline=true" data-zdeskdocid="img_44806349110696697" class="docsimage sty__aabri2__cls" data-zdeskdocselectedclass="small">     <img src="https://help.zoho.com/galleryDocuments/edbsnee9ab807a7b25b4e8f807e302b324b57feac86f3c60c65d62616eaeffd949b6d6b5b3d9188032be85e742865df9337cd38f14524cba2ff8edc36a50598158e04?inline=true" data-zdeskdocid="img_44349923965362015" class="docsimage sty__8098g9__cls" data-zdeskdocselectedclass="small"><br></div><div><br></div><div><div>In the offline mode, users will be able to view the details of the appointments in READ-ONLY mode.<br></div><ol><li class="sty__m2j8g3__cls">Details of the latest (by <b>Created Time</b>) 200 service appointments will be available offline. Related details of these service appointments like Service Reports, Time Sheets, Trips, Notes, and Work Orders will also be available offline.<br><br><img src="https://help.zoho.com/galleryDocuments/edbsnee9ab807a7b25b4e8f807e302b324b5781bf498c8384574f78dee6a064a669c5ac1ad46cbb3f44349428b2f9b0ecc7f0c986bacadf2d23e51c6583f5d5b23238?inline=true" data-zdeskdocid="img_254424753420311" class="docsimage sty__zb4s2c__cls" data-zdeskdocselectedclass="small"><br></li></ol></div><div>The offline mode will offer functionalities in a diminished capacity.
